data.description: WH Sr. Adviser Hassett concludes remarks

data.title: Shipley Donuts named top donut franchise on 2026 Entrepreneur Franchise 500. Leading brand for 5th year.
data.description: An esteemed brand based in Texas has once again emerged as the leader in its industry for the fifth consecutive year. Shipley Donuts, a renowned establishment known for its freshly made donuts and kolaches, has secured the top position among donut franchises in the recently published 2026 report. With its commitment to delivering high-quality, handcrafted treats, Shipley Donuts continues to solidify its position as the number one choice in the market.

data.title: Anfield Energy supports Trump's move on Processed Critical Minerals, emphasizing national security and domestic uranium production.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC - On January 15, 2026, Anfield Energy Inc. (TSX.V: AEC; NASDAQ: AEC; FRANKFURT: 0AD), a prominent U.S.-centered uranium and vanadium development firm moving closer to imminent production, expressed approval for President Trump’s declaration on January 14, 2026, under Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962. This proclamation, entitled “Adjusting Imports of Processed Critical Minerals and Their Derivative Products into the United States”, mandates negotiations with trade partners to tackle national security hazards related to imports of processed critical minerals (such as uranium) and their derivatives. The emphasis is on safeguarding and advancing domestic mining, processing, and supply chains.
Brent Crude futures settle at $63.76/bbl, down $2.76, 4.15%

data.title: Correction: USPS reports increased on-time delivery and higher customer satisfaction during holiday season in 2026.
data.description: According to a recent press release, the U.S. Postal Service has reported improvements in on-time delivery rates and increased customer satisfaction during the holiday season. The update was issued on January 15, 2026. As a result of these improvements, there has been a noticeable increase in timely deliveries and overall customer happiness. Additionally, a correction has been made to the email contact information for media inquiries. This demonstrates a positive change in performance and service quality for USPS.

data.title: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges ONTF, FFIC, OCFC shareholders to discuss their rights. Limited time.
data.description: Investors are advised to promptly reach out to the company as there is a restricted window to exercise their rights. In New York on January 15, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, is scrutinizing a list of companies for potential infringements of federal securities laws and breaches of regulations. It is imperative for shareholders to take timely action to protect their interests.

data.title: Breakthrough T1D awards $1.5 million grant to Blue Circle Health for underserved adults with Type 1 Diabetes.
data.description: A $1.5 million, three-year grant has been announced by Breakthrough T1D, a prominent global organization dedicated to type 1 diabetes (T1D) research and advocacy. The grant aims to enhance insurance and Medicaid guidance, as well as continuity of care for adults managing T1D.

data.title: Rose Bowl Stadium is investing $30M in a new South End Zone Field Club for modernization, official announced.
data.description: Pasadena, California - The Rose Bowl Operating Company (RBOC) revealed the commencement of the construction of the South End Zone Field Club on January 15, 2026. This project, costing $30 million, signifies a significant strategic investment by the Stadium to enhance its facilities through modernization. The initiative aims to uphold the Stadium's legacy while adapting to contemporary needs.

data.title: Coinbase's reversal delays crypto bill, leaving industry leaders to salvage it. Chances of passage now uncertain.
data.description: Key figures in the cryptocurrency industry were in a rush on Thursday to try to save the market structure bill, even though some acknowledged that its chances of being passed have decreased.

data.title: Crown Holdings recognizes facilities for sustainability efforts, announcing winners of 2025 Chairman's Sustainability Awards.
data.description: Today, Crown Holdings, Inc. revealed the recipients of its 2025 Chairman's Sustainability Awards. The company, listed as NYSE: CCK, based in Tampa, Florida, highlighted its facilities' notable progress in energy efficiency, recycling efforts, and workplace safety. The awards recognize the achievements of these facilities in advancing sustainability initiatives, with a focus on reducing environmental impact and promoting a safe and eco-friendly work environment. Through these efforts, Crown acknowledges the commitment to sustainability across its operations and the positive impact on its workforce and the environment.

data.title: Rep. Comer, farmers, and industry leaders request 2-year hemp extension in Washington for regulatory framework.
data.description: The Hemp Planting Predictability Act, introduced by Rep. James Comer (R-KY), seeks to offer farmers stability and time to develop a bipartisan regulatory framework. The legislation was announced in Washington on January 15, 2026. This act is significant for American farmers and industry professionals in the U.S., aiming to provide them with predictability for planting hemp. Its goal is to establish a responsible and bipartisan regulatory structure.
